scripts.backend:check: .venv/bin/python -m py_compile backend/*.py && .venv/bin/python -c "import backend.app" && (cd backend && ../.venv/bin/python -c "import app") && npm run backend:test
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run backend:check && npm run ios:build
scripts.ios:build: xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
